name: EGGGG
short_description: This is a simple game where all you need to do is control an egg to jump and climb high mountains to return to its nest. Trust me, most people will complete this challenge in a relaxed and pleasant mood.
detailed_description:
The earth trembles, and the eggs fall from their mountaintop nests, plunging into the valley's magical springs, where they gain the abilities to jump and self-heal.
Thus, the resilient eggs vow to leave the deep valley, climb the high mountains, and return to their nests.

  • A complete large map with various ecological environments, freely choose your climbing route.
  • Rich hidden paths, an accidental fall may lead to new discoveries.
  • Explore and collect different appearances for a new experience.
  • Fragile eggshells, which will break and leave nothing but egg liquid if they roll too much.
  • What then is the true ending hidden beneath the surface?

The promotional video uses music material licensed under CC BY (Commercial Use - Attribution), created by Shona-_2.
